login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in
login.head: Log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your details below to create your account
register.head: Register

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link
forgot_password.head: Forgot password

reset_password.title: Reset password
reset_password.description: Please enter your new password below
reset_password.head: Reset password

verify_email.title: Email verification
verify_email.description: Please verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you.
verify_email.head: Email verification
verify_email.link_sent: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.head: Profile settings
profile.section_description: Update your name, contact info, and profile picture
profile.resend_verification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
profile.verification_sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

security.title: Security settings
security.head: Security settings
security.section_description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

appearance.title: Appearance settings
appearance.head: Appearance settings
appearance.section_description: Update the appearance settings for your account

delete_user.title: Delete account
delete_user.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
delete_user.warning_text: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
delete_user.dialog_title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete_user.dialog_description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
